brief.rationale: Lead with a fabricated credential — should fail claimed_facts only.

email.subject_b: Maya's tandoori cauliflower lands Tuesday — early access
email.body: Maya's three-Michelin-star tandoori cauliflower steak is here, {{first_name}} — and it's not asking for permission. Smoke, char, coconut-yogurt finish — the fork works overtime. Not a kit. Just dinner — already cooked. [Add to plan]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Hey {{first_name}} — Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak just landed. Tap → {{short_url}}

push.title: Maya's cauliflower steak just landed
push.body: Tap to add it before Sunday's cutoff.
